import React, { useState } from "react"; import { calculateRisk } from "../utils/riskScore"; export default function AnalyzeWill({ onBack, onLogout, goToBeneficiary }) { const user = { name: "User" }; const [sentiment] = useState("Negative"); const [fraudWarnings] = useState([ "Unusual beneficiary change detected", "Emotional language found" ]); const riskScore = calculateRisk(sentiment, fraudWarnings); const getRiskLabel = (score) => { if (score >= 70) return "High Risk Detected"; if (score >= 40) return "Moderate Risks Detected"; return "Low Risk Detected"; }; const getRiskColor = (score) => { if (score >= 70) return "text-red-500"; if (score >= 40) return "text-orange-500"; return "text-green-500"; }; return (
